input.video_title: Dark Moody Fall Mantel Makeover Using Rust-Oleum Chalked Paint
input.video_description_draft: Transform your boring mantel into a moody, collected fall display using Rust-Oleum Chalked Paint in Linen White and thrift store finds from Goodwill. This weekend makeover costs under $40. In this video I cover prepping the surface, painting technique, and how to layer candlesticks, dried botanicals, and vintage brass accessories for a dark fall aesthetic.

chapter_outline.chapter_topic: Supplies list and where to find them
Prepping and painting with chalk paint

input.video_description_draft: I found this beat-up armoire at Goodwill for $15 and turned it into a moody statement piece using Annie Sloan chalk paint and dark wax. Full tutorial showing prep, paint, wax finish, and hardware swap. Total cost under $35.
